en: Sarah lived 127 years; these were the years of the life of Sarah.
zh: 撒拉享壽一百二十七歲，這是撒拉一生的歲數。

en: And Sarah died at Kiriath-arba (that is, Hebron) in the land of Canaan, and Abraham went in to mourn for Sarah and to weep for her.
zh: 撒拉死在迦南地的基列．亞巴，就是希伯崙；亞伯拉罕進去為撒拉哀慟哭號。

en: And Abraham rose up from before his dead and said to the Hittites,
zh: 亞伯拉罕從死者面前起來，對赫人說：

en: "I am a sojourner and foreigner among you; give me property among you for a burying place, that I may bury my dead out of my sight."
zh: “我是在你們中間寄居的外族人，求你們在你們中間給我一塊墳地作產業，使我可以埋葬我死了的人，使她不露在我面前。”

en: The Hittites answered Abraham,
zh: 赫人回答亞伯拉罕，說：

en: "Hear us, my lord; you are a prince of God among us. Bury your dead in the choicest of our tombs. None of us will withhold from you his tomb to hinder you from burying your dead."
zh: “我主請聽，你在我們中間是一位尊貴的王子，你可以在我們最好的墳地裡埋葬你死了的人，我們必沒有人阻止你在他的墳地埋葬你死了的人。”

en: Abraham rose and bowed to the Hittites, the people of the land.
zh: 於是，亞伯拉罕起來，向當地的赫人下拜，

en: And he said to them, "If you are willing that I should bury my dead out of my sight, hear me and entreat for me Ephron the son of Zohar,
zh: 對他們說：“你們若有意使我埋葬我死了的人，使她不露在我的眼前，就請聽我的話，為我請求瑣轄的兒子以弗崙，

en: that he may give me the cave of Machpelah, which he owns; it is at the end of his field. For the full price let him give it to me in your presence as property for a burying place."
zh: 叫他把他所擁有的，田頭上那麥比拉洞賣給我。他可以按著十足的價銀賣給我，使我在你們中間有產業作墳地。”

en: Now Ephron was sitting among the Hittites, and Ephron the Hittite answered Abraham in the hearing of the Hittites, of all who went in at the gate of his city,
zh: 那時，以弗崙正坐在赫人中間。於是，赫人以弗崙就回答亞伯拉罕，所有來到城門口的赫人都聽見他說：

en: "No, my lord, hear me: I give you the field, and I give you the cave that is in it. In the sight of the sons of my people I give it to you. Bury your dead."
zh: “我主，不要這樣，請聽我說，這塊田我送給你，連其中的洞我也送給你。我在我的族人眼前送給你，讓你可以埋葬你死了的人。”

en: Then Abraham bowed down before the people of the land.
zh: 亞伯拉罕就在當地的人面前下拜，

en: And he said to Ephron in the hearing of the people of the land, "But if you will, hear me: I give the price of the field. Accept it from me, that I may bury my dead there."
zh: 然後在當地的人面前對以弗崙說：“請聽我說，如果你願意，我必定把地的價銀給你，請你收下吧，讓我可以在那裡埋葬我死了的人。”

en: Ephron answered Abraham,
zh: 以弗崙回答亞伯拉罕，對他說：

en: "My lord, listen to me: a piece of land worth four hundred shekels of silver, what is that between you and me? Bury your dead."
zh: “我主，請聽我說，一塊值四百塊 銀子的田地，在你我之間，算得甚麼呢？你埋葬你死了的人吧。”

en: Abraham listened to Ephron, and Abraham weighed out for Ephron the silver that he had named in the hearing of the Hittites, four hundred shekels of silver, according to the weights current among the merchants.
zh: 亞伯拉罕同意以弗崙說的價銀，就照著他在赫人面前所說的，拿商人通用的銀子，稱了四百塊 銀子給以弗崙。

en: So the field of Ephron in Machpelah, which was to the east of Mamre, the field with the cave that was in it and all the trees that were in the field, throughout its whole area, was made over
zh: 於是，以弗崙在麥比拉，在幔利前面的那塊地，包括那塊田和其中的洞，田中和四周所有的樹木，

en: to Abraham as a possession in the presence of the Hittites, before all who went in at the gate of his city.
zh: 都在赫人眼前，就是在所有來到城門口的赫人眼前，歸給亞伯拉罕作產業。

en: After this, Abraham buried Sarah his wife in the cave of the field of Machpelah east of Mamre (that is, Hebron) in the land of Canaan.
zh: 這事以後，亞伯拉罕把自己的妻子撒拉埋在迦南地，幔利前面麥比拉田間的洞裡。幔利就是希伯崙。

en: The field and the cave that is in it were made over to Abraham as property for a burying place by the Hittites.
zh: 這樣，那塊田和田中的洞，就從赫人歸給了亞伯拉罕為產業作墳地。
